title: Data Pager Mode
description: Defines the display mode options for the data pager component, controlling how pagination controls are presented to the user.

props.name: full
props.description: Full display mode showing all pagination controls including page numbers, navigation buttons, page size selector, and info display.

props.name: compact
props.description: Compact display mode showing minimal pagination controls, typically just navigation buttons and basic info.

props.name: custom
props.description: Custom display mode allowing developers to define their own pagination layout and controls.
